title: Tile Model
description: Core Tile struct with CIImage backing, average color (Lab/HSL), file metadata (path, size, dimensions), and Sendable conformance for concurrent pipeline access.

title: ImageLoader
description: Async image loading pipeline using Core Image. Supports JPEG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, RAW. Thumbnail generation with configurable target size. Memory-mapped I/O for large tile sets.

title: Settings & Config
description: MosaicConfig value type: tile size, color space (sRGB/Display P3), duplicate policy (allow/forbid/limit N), quality preset (draft/standard/high/ultra), output format.

title: Color Analysis
description: CIImage color averaging via CIAreaAverage. Lab color space conversion for perceptual distance. HSL decomposition for saturation/lightness weighting. SIMD-accelerated batch processing.

title: TileCollectionManager
description: Manages tile libraries with add/remove/tag operations. On-disk cache with SQLite metadata index. Background import with progress reporting. Deduplication via perceptual hash.

title: CPU Tile Scorer
description: Brute-force tile matching using CIE76/CIE94/CIEDE2000 color distance formulas. Region-based scoring: split source cell into NxN sub-regions, weight by visual importance. Swift Concurrency task groups for parallelism.

title: Tile Cache
description: LRU in-memory cache for decoded CIImages with configurable size limit. Disk-backed thumbnail cache for collection browsing. Cache invalidation on tile library modification.

title: MosaicBuilder
description: Core engine: takes source image + tile collection + config, produces MosaicPlan. Grid decomposition with configurable cell aspect ratio. Async build with cancellation support. Progress stream via AsyncSequence.

title: Color Adjustment
description: Post-match color correction blending tile toward source cell color. Configurable blend factor (0-100%). CIColorMatrix and CIHueAdjust Core Image filters. Preserves tile texture while matching overall hue.

title: Metal Tile Scorer
description: GPU-accelerated tile matching via Metal compute shaders. Parallel distance calculation across entire tile library. Shared MTLBuffer for tile color descriptors. 10-50x speedup over CPU scorer for large libraries.

title: MosaicPlan
description: Intermediate representation: grid of (cell rect, assigned tile, score, adjustments). Supports plan inspection, manual tile swaps, re-scoring. Codable for save/restore. Diffable for undo integration.

title: MosaicExporter
description: Renders MosaicPlan to JPEG/PNG/TIFF at full resolution. Tiled rendering for gigapixel output (16K+ mosaics). Core Image render pipeline with GPU composition. EXIF metadata preservation.

title: Build Report
description: Post-build analytics: tile usage histogram, color coverage map, duplicate tile locations, average match score, worst-match cells. Exportable as JSON or HTML report.

title: WebMosaicExporter
description: Interactive HTML viewer with deep-zoom (tile pyramid generation). Hover reveals original tile source path. Leaflet.js or OpenSeadragon integration for smooth pan/zoom on gigapixel mosaics.

title: SwiftUI Menu Bar
description: Document-based SwiftUI app shell. Menu bar with File (Open Source, Open Collection), Edit (Undo/Redo swap), View (Zoom, Show Grid), Mosaic (Build, Export, Report) menus.

title: Mosaic Editor View
description: Main editor: source image preview (left), mosaic preview (right), split-view with draggable divider. Zoom synchronized between panels. Click cell to inspect/swap tile. Real-time build progress overlay.

title: Collection Browser
description: Grid view of tile collection with thumbnail previews. Search by color, tag, or filename. Drag-and-drop import from Finder. Usage stats per tile (times used across mosaics).

title: Live Preview
description: Real-time mosaic preview during build via AsyncSequence progress stream. Progressive refinement: show draft quality first, refine to final. Metal-backed preview rendering for smooth interaction.

title: Pattern Modes
description: Alternative tiling patterns beyond rectangular grid: hexagonal, Voronoi, circular, spiral, brick/offset. Pattern protocol for extensibility. Each pattern defines cell geometry and neighbor relationships.

title: Mask Support
description: Alpha mask input to constrain mosaic to arbitrary shapes. Support for text masks (render string as mask), image masks, and SVG path masks. Masked regions filled with transparent or solid color.

title: Tile Splitting
description: Adaptive tile sizing: high-detail source regions get smaller tiles, low-detail regions get larger tiles. Quadtree decomposition based on edge detection or variance thresholding.

title: VideoMosaicExporter
description: Animated mosaic video via AVFoundation. Frame-by-frame mosaic of video source with temporal coherence (minimize tile flickering between frames). Export as H.264/HEVC MOV.

title: PSD Layer Export
description: Export mosaic as layered PSD: each tile as a separate layer with position/transform. Enables post-production editing in Photoshop/Affinity. Uses Core Graphics PDF/PSD generation.

title: Multi-Platform SPM
description: Restructured Package.swift into YJMosaicCore shared library + YJMosaic (macOS) + YJMosaiciOS (iOS) targets. All engine, IO, services, and model types made public. #if canImport guards for platform-conditional code. Plane: YJM-50.

title: iOS App Entry Point
description: YJMosaiciOSApp @main with adaptive ContentView: TabView on iPhone, NavigationSplitView on iPad. AppTab enum (library, create, gallery) with CaseIterable + Identifiable. Localized tab labels via String(localized:). Plane: YJM-51.

title: PhotoProvider Protocol
description: Abstract photo source protocol with PhotoAlbum and PhotoAssetItem Sendable structs. Scope-based access: all, albums, shared albums, faces, places. iCloudPhotosProvider implements PHPhotoLibrary, PHAssetCollection, PHFetchResult. Plane: YJM-52.

title: Google Photos Adapter
description: REST adapter for Google Photos Library API v2. OAuth 2.0 + PKCE via ASWebAuthenticationSession. Keychain token storage. Rate limit handling (429 → exponential backoff). Paginated album/media fetch. Plane: YJM-53.

title: Photo Library Browser
description: PhotoLibraryView with provider picker (iCloud/Google), scope tab bar (all/albums/shared/faces/places), album grid, multi-select photo grid, import progress bar. Adaptive column count: 3 iPhone / 5 iPad. Plane: YJM-54.

title: PHAsset Tile Import
description: TileCollectionManager extension: importFromPhotos(assets:progress:) processes PHAssets in batches of 50 with autoreleasepool. addTiles() public actor method. Progress callback via Task.yield. Plane: YJM-55.

title: iOS Mosaic Builder
description: MosaicBuilderView with PhotosPicker source selection, pattern/quality/rows/color-adjust controls, preset buttons (Default/High Detail/Quick Draft/Cinematic/Parquet), build progress overlay, navigation to preview on completion. Plane: YJM-56.

title: PHAsset CGImage Bridge
description: ImageLoader extension: loadCGImage(from:targetSize:) wraps PHImageManager.requestImage as async/await with isSynchronous=true. UIImage.cgImage on iOS, NSImage.cgImage on macOS. Guarded with #if canImport(Photos). Plane: YJM-60.

title: iOS Mosaic Preview
description: MosaicPreviewiOSView: Canvas-rendered MosaicPlan with pinch-to-zoom (0.25x–5x), tile boundary overlay toggle, ShareLink with rendered UIImage, Photos library save via PHAssetCreationRequest, JPEG/PNG/HEIC export format picker. Plane: YJM-57.

title: iOS Gallery
description: GalleryView with LazyVGrid thumbnails from MosaicStorage. Tap opens GalleryDetailView with full-res + ShareLink. Context menu delete with confirmation dialog. MosaicStorage: Documents/Mosaics/ with full image + thumbnail + JSON metadata. Plane: YJM-58.

title: HEIC Export + Photos Save
description: ExportFormat enum extended with .heic case using UTType. MosaicExportHelper: renderMosaicImage, saveToPhotosLibrary (PHAssetCreationRequest), imageData for JPEG/PNG/HEIC. HEIC compression properties match JPEG quality path. Plane: YJM-61.

title: iPad Adaptive Layout
description: NavigationSplitView sidebar on .regular size class (iPad), TabView on .compact (iPhone). adaptiveGridColumnCount: 3 iPhone / 5 iPad / 7 iPad landscape. UISupportsMultipleWindows for Stage Manager. Plane: YJM-59.

title: Thermal Manager
description: ThermalManager enum with OS-conditional logic: bandHeight 1024 iOS / 2048 macOS, threadgroupWidth 8 under thermal pressure / 16 normal, tileBatchSize 50 iOS / 500 macOS. MemoryPressureObserver via UIApplication.didReceiveMemoryWarningNotification. Plane: YJM-62.

title: iOS App Icons + Info.plist
description: Info.plist with NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription, NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription, UILaunchScreen, UISupportsMultipleWindows, UISupportedInterfaceOrientations (all 4). Assets.xcassets with full AppIcon appiconset manifest for all iPhone/iPad sizes. Plane: YJM-63.

title: iOS Localization
description: iOS Localizable.strings with tab.*, library.*, provider.*, scope.*, gallery.*, builder.* keys. YJMosaicCore shared strings (menu, editor, controls, patterns, quality, presets). All views use String(localized:) for tab labels, navigation titles, provider names. Plane: YJM-64.

title: Inspector Panel
description: Right-side slide-out inspector panel in MosaicEditorView (⌘⌥I toggle). AppLogStore @Observable singleton ring buffer (1000 entries) with YJLog() dual-sink helper (os.Logger + in-app). LogConsoleView with YJLogLevel filter chips, auto-scroll, monospace rows, color-coded severity. AGUIDevPanel with AG-UI mode (POST to APM /api/upm/event) and Shell mode (Process + Pipe + AsyncBytes.lines streaming). InspectorPanelView with Logs/Developer tabs and DisclosureGroup AG-UI Session Bridge.
